ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_number" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "cholesterol" INTEGER /* Cholesterol level of the patient */,
  "glucose" INTEGER /* Glucose level of the patient */,
  "hdl_chol" INTEGER /* HDL cholesterol level of the patient */,
  "chol_hdl_ratio" REAL /* Cholesterol to HDL ratio of the patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the patient in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the patient in pounds */,
  "bmi" REAL /* Body Mass Index (BMI) of the patient */,
  "systolic_bp" INTEGER /* Systolic blood pressure of the patient */,
  "diastolic_bp" INTEGER /* Diastolic blood pressure of the patient */,
  "waist" INTEGER /* Waist circumference of the patient in inches */,
  "hip" INTEGER /* Hip circumference of the patient in inches */,
  "waist_hip_ratio" REAL /* Waist to hip ratio of the patient */,
  "diabetes" TEXT /* Diabetes status of the patient (Yes/No) */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  "family_diabetes_history" TEXT /* Family history of diabetes (Yes/No/Unknown) */,
  "smoking_status" TEXT /* Smoking status of the patient (Yes/No/Unknown) */,
  "alcohol_consumption" TEXT /* Alcohol consumption status of the patient (Yes/No/Unknown) */,
  "physical_activity" TEXT /* Physical activity level of the patient (High/Medium/Low/Unknown) */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the patient */,
  "last_visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the patient's last visit */,
  "diabetes_type" TEXT /* Type of diabetes (Type 1/Type 2/Unknown) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient reading */,
  "patient_number" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the reading belongs to */,
  "reading_date" TEXT /* Date the reading was taken */,
  "cholesterol" INTEGER /* Cholesterol level of the patient at the time of reading */,
  "glucose" INTEGER /* Glucose level of the patient at the time of reading */,
  "hdl_chol" INTEGER /* HDL cholesterol level of the patient at the time of reading */,
  "chol_hdl_ratio" REAL /* Cholesterol to HDL ratio of the patient at the time of reading */,
  "systolic_bp" INTEGER /* Systolic blood pressure of the patient at the time of reading */,
  "diastolic_bp" INTEGER /* Diastolic blood pressure of the patient at the time of reading */,
  "triglycerides" INTEGER /* Triglyceride level of the patient at the time of reading */,
  "ldl_chol" INTEGER /* LDL cholesterol level of the patient at the time of reading */,
  "a1c" REAL /* Glycated hemoglobin (A1C) level of the patient at the time of reading */,
  "activity_level" TEXT /* Physical activity level of the patient at the time of reading (High/Medium/Low/Unknown) */,
  "medication" TEXT /* Medications taken by the patient at the time of reading */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments by the healthcare provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_readings_patient_number FOREIGN KEY ("patient_number") REFERENCES patients ("patient_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for login */,
  "role" TEXT /* User role (e.g., researcher, data analyst, medical professional) */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  "phone" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team's focus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "team_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Report data in a structured format */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
